overall_recommendation_display: Proceed only if FP0 fixpack is accepted and executed

why.codes: Evidence needed: Environmental baseline note (scope, metrics) — acceptance criteria: scope, metrics, measurement methods, and data sources detailed with sustainability lead sign-off., Cloud carbon estimate v1 (regions/services) — acceptance criteria: regional/service mix applied, monthly kgCO2e calculated with methodology notes, and results published to shared dashboard.

markdown:
- **Status:** YELLOW - **Recommendation:** GO\_IF\_FP0, Proceed only if FP0 fixpack is accepted and executed ### Summary of Critical Issues by Domain | Domain | Status | Issue Codes | |--------|--------|-------------| | Ecological Integrity | GRAY | Evidence needed: Environmental baseline note \(scope, metrics\) — acceptance criteria: scope, metrics, measurement methods, and data sources detailed with sustainability lead sign\-off\., Cloud carbon estimate v1 \(regions/services\) — acceptance criteria: regional/service mix applied, monthly kgCO2e calculated with methodology notes, and results published to shared dashboard\. | | Human Stability | YELLOW | TRAINING\_GAPS, TALENT\_UNKNOWN | | Economic Resilience | YELLOW | CONTINGENCY\_LOW, UNIT\_ECON\_UNKNOWN | ### Go/No-Go Criteria

Must be met to proceed.

- \>=10% contingency approved - Monte Carlo risk workbook attached - Licenses bundled - DPIAs bundled - Retention policy links added
